name: cc-aviatrix-siem
author: Aviatrix
description: Parse, normalize, and route Aviatrix Cloud Network syslog data for any SIEM destination. Supports 9 log types: L4 Microsegmentation, L7/TLS Inspection, Suricata IDS, FQDN Firewall, Controller API Audit, VPN Session, Gateway Network Stats, Gateway System Stats, and Tunnel Status.
